description: Minimal fixture used to validate the harness end-to-end. Three categories, each backed by a self-contained two-session conversation that mirrors the LoCoMo shape.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Hey, I'm Alex. Just wanted to share something fun.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: I just adopted a black Labrador. We named her Pepper because she's full of energy.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Pepper had her first training class today.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: She's stubborn but smart. The trainer said she'll learn fast.

cases.question: When did Alex start the new job at Stripe?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: I joined Stripe in March 2024. It's been a wild ride since.

cases.question: What is Alex's mother's maiden name?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: I want to fly to Lisbon next month.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Booked TAP for the 12th. Will stay for a week.
